Goal.title: Goal
Goal.description: A business or life goal to be achieved.

uid.description: The user ID who owns this goal.

status.description: The current status of the goal.

category.description: The category of the goal (e.g., Business, Life).

StrategySection.title: Strategy Section
StrategySection.description: A section of the business strategy canvas.

uid.description: The user ID who owns this strategy.

sectionId.description: The ID of the section (e.g., value-prop).

content.description: The content of the strategy section.

updatedAt.description: When the section was last updated.
